title: polybotrya cervina
intro: Polybotrya cervina, also known as the deer's shield, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Polybotrya cervina include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Polybotrya cervina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
